name: Magic bath bomb
description: A truly enchanting bath bomb with a remarkably potent and long-lasting scent — fans have noted its fragrance is so strong it can perfume nearby objects even weeks later. Drop into your bath and let the magic unfold.
archive_note: A recurring Lush Kitchen exclusive bath bomb that has appeared periodically since at least 2016, consistently selling out quickly due to high demand.
nostalgia_angle: A long-coveted Kitchen classic that fans have chased for years, known for its incredibly powerful and lingering scent that even perfumed nearby catalogues.
throwback_reference: A Kitchen classic that has returned multiple times since at least 2016, legendary among fans for its extraordinarily potent and long-lasting fragrance — reportedly strong enough to scent nearby Lush catalogues and packaging left in the same room.
